summary: Completed testing of 3 fixes in iteration 25. All issues verified and working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 issues tested and verified working: 1) Licensee account_value comes from license.current_amount via API - Dashboard and Profit Tracker both fetch from adminAPI.getMemberDetails() which returns the authoritative value, 2) Member Management endpoint excludes users with license_type - query has 'license_type': {'$exists': False}, 3) Login page styling - no h1 title, logo has object-contain class with max-w-[200px] max-h-[80px] constraints.

licensee_account_value_from_api.details: Dashboard shows $1,000.00 for licensee with license.current_amount=$1,000. Profit Tracker shows $2,000.00 for licensee with license.current_amount=$2,000. Values fetched from adminAPI.getMemberDetails() endpoint.

member_management_excludes_licensees.details: Member Management shows 'Total Members: 3' and 'Licensed Users: 10' separately. No licensees (honorary/extended) appear in the member list. Backend query includes 'license_type': {'$exists': False}.

login_page_styling.details: No h1 title element on login page. Logo has classes: 'max-w-[200px] max-h-[80px] object-contain mb-2'. Tagline 'Finance Center' displayed correctly.

api_tests.GET /api/admin/members: PASS - Returns only users without license_type
api_tests.GET /api/admin/members/{user_id}: PASS - Returns account_value from license.current_amount for licensees
api_tests.GET /api/admin/licenses: PASS - Returns all licenses with current_amount
api_tests.GET /api/settings/platform: PASS - Returns platform settings including logo_url

ui_tests.login_page: PASS - No title, logo not cropped (object-contain)
ui_tests.dashboard_licensee_simulation: PASS - Shows correct account_value from API
ui_tests.profit_tracker_licensee_simulation: PASS - Shows correct account_value from API
